title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 178.639 - Employees of college eligible for Missouri state employees' retirement system
text:
178.639.  Employees of college eligible for Missouri state employees' retirement system. — Any person who becomes an employee of the State Technical College of Missouri after the conditions of section 178.631 are met shall become a member of the Missouri state employees' retirement system, if the person otherwise meets the requirements for membership in that system.
(L. 1995 S.B. 101 § 9, A.L. 2013 H.B. 673) 
Effective 7-01-14
